name: Weber 14" 10020 Portable Grill: Charcoal, Weather-Resistant, Porcelain-Coated, Steel Grates, 147 sq. in. Cooking Area
description: The Weber 14' 10020 Portable Grill is the premier traveling grill. Perfect for cookouts at home, tailgating parties, hiking, and camping excursions. This Weber smokey joe performs as well as any Weber full-size charcoal grill. It also features a porcelain-enameled lid and bowl for that extra durability. The plated steel cooking grate has enough cooking space to feed a small group. The kettle is designed to cook your BBQ brunches, hearty steak dinners, and other outdoor cooking. To grill your meal to perfection, maintain the desired grilling temperature by adjusting the rust-resistant aluminum damper. The charcoal grate is easy to clean and maintain without hassles. This portable grill makes the perfect addition to your patio and it's another reason to get all your loved ones together for a great meal. Cooking up an elaborate feast is always so easy with the Weber Smokey Joe.
